stemHtml: An aircraft flying IMC on an airway is uncertain about maintaining lateral separation from another aircraft. How can ATC verify that the required lateral separation exists?

options.a: Require both pilots to report their positions to confirm they are in different geographic areas.
options.b: Check filed flight plans to verify different routes.
options.c: Verify their tracks are more than 15° divergent using NDB at a distance of at least 10 NM.
options.d: Verify their tracks are more than 30° divergent using VOR at a distance of at least 15 NM.
